---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. What are you trying to do that you can't currently do?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible — wireframes, examples, or references to similar tools are all helpful.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternative approaches you've thought about and why they don't fully solve the problem.

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or links that might help.
